properties.remark: MINOR STREET FLOODING REPORTED NEAR SOUTH GRANT AND CLINTON STREETS IN POCATELLO. 4 TO 6 INCHES DEEP. TRAFFIC CAN STILL PASS THROUGH SAFELY.
